cm.name: Rekha Gupta
portfolios: All departments not allocated to other ministers

ministers.name: Rekha Gupta
portfolios: All departments not allocated to other ministers

channels.label: Delhi CM Helpline (CM Jan Sunwai)
channels.source_name: CM Jan Sunwai Portal, Government of NCT of Delhi
channels.note: Published on the official CM Jan Sunwai portal as the CM Helpline Number. Portal also lists contact email delhi-mitra[at]delhi[dot]gov[dot]in.

channels.label: CM Jan Sunwai Portal (online public grievance portal)
channels.source_name: CM Jan Sunwai Portal, Government of NCT of Delhi
channels.note: Unified Delhi government grievance redressal portal; register, track and give feedback on complaints across Delhi government departments. A 'CM Jansunwai' mobile app is also offered.

channels.label: Public Grievances Commission (PGC), Delhi
channels.source_name: Public Grievances Commission, Government of NCT of Delhi
channels.note: Independent Delhi government body (est. Resolution of 25 Sept 1997) for complaints against govt departments, local bodies and public institutions. Site last updated 14/07/2026. Its 'Lodge Complain' link points to an IP-based host (164.100.72.198/PGC/login.do) rather than a named domain.

channels.label: Public Grievances Commission office
channels.source_name: Public Grievances Commission, Government of NCT of Delhi
channels.note: Second listed line: 011-23370903. Office at M-Block, Vikas Bhawan, I.P. Estate, New Delhi-110110.

channels.label: Government of NCT of Delhi - official state portal
channels.source_name: Government of National Capital Territory of Delhi
channels.note: Official Delhi state portal. Delhi Secretariat, I.P. Estate, New Delhi-110002.

channels.label: District Offices directory (Delhi's 13 revenue districts)
channels.source_name: Department of Revenue, Government of NCT of Delhi
channels.note: IMPORTANT CAVEAT: Delhi's state portal has NO 'Districts' listing page that links to each district's own website - this was checked against delhi.gov.in/sitemap, delhi.gov.in/departments-offices and revenue.delhi.gov.in, and delhi.gov.in/page/districts returns 404. As a city-state Delhi appears not to publish such an index. This Revenue Department page is the closest official directory: it lists all districts (North, Central, South, New Delhi, South West, West, North East, East, North West, South East, Old Delhi, Central North, Outer North) with office addresses, phone numbers and emails, but does NOT hyperlink the individual district sites. Individual district sites do exist and follow the pattern dm<district>.delhi.gov.in (e.g. dmnorth.delhi.gov.in, dmnewdelhi.delhi.gov.in) or dccentral.delhi.gov.in - but no official page indexes them, so that pattern is NOT asserted here as a sourced claim. Site last updated 14/07/2026.

channels.label: List of Deputy Commissioners / District Magistrates, Delhi
channels.source_name: Department of Revenue, Government of NCT of Delhi
channels.note: Telephone directory of District Magistrates across Delhi's administrative divisions, with officer names, office phone, fax, mobile and email. Complements the district offices directory.

channels.label: Delhi Police - official portal
channels.source_name: Delhi Police ('Shanti Sewa Nyaya'), Government of NCT of Delhi
channels.note: Official Delhi Police site; hosts citizen services including e-FIR for motor vehicle theft, lost report, FIR view, police clearance certificate, tenant/domestic help registration and complaint status.

channels.label: Delhi Police citizen services / complaint portal (CCTNS)
channels.source_name: Delhi Police CCTNS Citizen Portal
channels.note: Citizen login for filing and tracking police complaints online. The portal itself advises: for immediate help call 112, as online services take time to action.

channels.label: Delhi Commission for Women (office)
channels.source_name: Department of Women and Child Development, Government of NCT of Delhi
channels.note: Office line, Monday to Friday, 9:30 AM to 6 PM. This is the office number, not the 24x7 helpline - use 181 for emergencies.

channels.label: DCW Mobile Helpline vans - centralized number
channels.source_name: Department of Women and Child Development, Government of NCT of Delhi
channels.note: Centralized 24x7 number for Delhi Commission for Women mobile helpline vans operating zone-wise across Delhi.

channels.label: Rape Crisis Cell, Delhi
channels.source_name: Department of Women and Child Development, Government of NCT of Delhi
channels.note: Listed as 24x7.

channels.label: Women in Distress (Delhi Police)
channels.source_name: Delhi Police, Government of NCT of Delhi
channels.note: Delhi Police helpline for women in distress, distinct from the DCW 181 helpline.

channels.label: Senior Citizen helpline (Delhi Police)
channels.source_name: Delhi Police, Government of NCT of Delhi

channels.label: Missing Persons helpline (Delhi Police)
channels.source_name: Delhi Police, Government of NCT of Delhi
channels.note: Delhi Police homepage also lists 23241210 as an alternate line for missing persons.

channels.label: Delhi Traffic Police helpline
channels.source_name: Delhi Police, Government of NCT of Delhi
channels.note: Delhi Police homepage also lists 25844444 as an alternate traffic line.

channels.label: Delhi Police Vigilance
channels.source_name: Delhi Police, Government of NCT of Delhi

channels.label: BSES Rajdhani (BRPL) 24x7 electricity helpline - south & west Delhi
channels.source_name: BSES Rajdhani Power Ltd - No Supply Complaint (official site)
channels.note: 24x7 toll-free short code published on BRPL's official complaint page; WhatsApp 8800919123 and streetlight emergency 011-49516707 also listed. Online no-supply complaints on the same page.

channels.label: BSES Yamuna (BYPL) 24x7 electricity helpline - east & central Delhi
channels.source_name: BSES Yamuna Power Ltd - No Supply Complaint (official site)
channels.note: 24x7 helpline published on BYPL's official complaint page (divisions incl. Chandni Chowk, Daryaganj, Pahar Ganj, Patel Nagar, Karawal Nagar, Nand Nagri, Yamuna Vihar, Krishna Nagar, Laxmi Nagar, Mayur Vihar); streetlight emergency 011-41999808.

channels.label: Tata Power-DDL 24x7 helpline - north & north-west Delhi
channels.source_name: Tata Power Delhi Distribution Ltd - Customer Care / Locate Us
channels.note: Round-the-clock customer care short code; from outside Delhi or if 19124 is unreachable use 1800-208-9124 (published on the same page).

channels.label: Power Department Public Grievances Cell (toll-free) - statewide escalation
channels.source_name: Power Department, Government of NCT of Delhi
channels.note: The centrally-published Delhi government electricity consumer grievance line, listed as 'Tel: 1800112222 (Toll-free)' for the PG Cell. Page also lists SMS: 9223166166 for the same cell. Page last updated 03/07/2026. Delhi's discoms are private (BSES Rajdhani, BSES Yamuna, Tata Power-DDL) and the state does not publish their retail complaint numbers centrally; the same page lists CGRF (Consumer Grievance Redressal Forum) contacts instead - CGRF-BRPL 8468952631 / 8468935702, CGRF-BYPL 8010939760, CGRF-TPDDL 27466601-03 / 27463809 - which may be approached only after exhausting the discom's own complaint procedure.

channels.label: NDMC 24/7 helpline (incl. electricity) - Lutyens' Delhi (NDMC area)
channels.source_name: New Delhi Municipal Council - Contact Us
channels.note: NDMC's general 24/7 toll-free helpline; NDMC supplies electricity in the New Delhi (Lutyens) municipal area.

channels.label: NDMC electricity no-current complaint centres - Lutyens' Delhi
channels.source_name: New Delhi Municipal Council - No Current Complaint Centers
channels.note: Area-wise complaint centre landlines for NDMC's electricity supply area (e.g. Vidyut Bhawan 011-23013511, Connaught Place 011-23413882).

channels.label: Delhi Water helpline (Delhi Jal Board)
channels.source_name: Government of NCT of Delhi - Helpline Center
channels.note: Listed verbatim as 'Water Helpline : 1916'. Page last updated 14/07/2026.

channels.label: DDMA (Delhi Disaster Management Authority) helpline
channels.source_name: Government of NCT of Delhi - Helpline Center
channels.note: Listed verbatim as 'DDMA Helpline : 1077'. Page last updated 14/07/2026.

channels.label: AIDS helpline (toll free)
channels.source_name: Government of NCT of Delhi - Helpline Center
channels.note: Listed verbatim as 'Toll free AIDS Helpline number : 1097'. Page last updated 14/07/2026.

channels.label: PWD (Public Works Department) helpline - toll free
channels.source_name: Government of NCT of Delhi - Helpline Center
channels.note: Listed verbatim as 'PWD Helpline : Toll Free Number : +91-1800110093'. For roads/public works complaints. Page last updated 14/07/2026.

channels.label: Anti-Corruption Branch helpline
channels.source_name: Government of NCT of Delhi - Helpline Center
channels.note: The page's entry reads verbatim '1031 anti-corruption : +91-11-27357169'. The dialable number published there is the landline given here; '1031' appears as part of the label. Because the page does not unambiguously present 1031 as a standalone dialable short code, only the landline is asserted as a sourced value. Page last updated 14/07/2026.

channels.label: Taxation / Businessmen helpline
channels.source_name: Government of NCT of Delhi - Helpline Center
channels.note: Listed verbatim as 'Businessmen/Taxation Helpline : +91-1800 4250 0025'. Page last updated 14/07/2026.

channels.label: Transport Department / Auto helpline
channels.source_name: Government of NCT of Delhi - Helpline Center
channels.note: Listed verbatim as 'Auto/Transport Department Helpline : +91-11-23958836'. Page last updated 14/07/2026.

channels.label: National Emergency Number (ERSS) - Police, Fire & Rescue, Health
channels.source_name: Ministry of Home Affairs, Government of India
channels.note: MHA's single pan-India emergency number: 'ONE INDIA ONE EMERGENCY NUMBER 112', a nationwide unified emergency response system. Works in every State/UT. Corroborated by india.gov.in helpline directory, which lists 112 as the Integrated Helpline (ERSS) covering Police, Fire & Rescue and Health services.

channels.label: Fire Helpline
channels.source_name: National Portal of India (india.gov.in), NIC / MeitY
channels.note: Listed under 'Emergency Numbers' on the National Portal of India helpline directory (page last reviewed/updated 14 July 2026).

channels.label: National Ambulance Service (NAS)
channels.source_name: National Portal of India (india.gov.in), NIC / MeitY
channels.note: Listed as 'National Ambulance Service (NAS)' under Emergency Numbers on the National Portal of India helpline directory (page last reviewed/updated 14 July 2026).

channels.label: Women Helpline (national, toll-free)
channels.source_name: Ministry of Women and Child Development, Government of India
channels.note: Published as 'Women Helpline Toll free No. - 181' directly by the owning ministry (WCD) as a tel: link on its homepage. Also listed on india.gov.in as both 'Women Helpline Number' and 'Domestic Violence Helpline'.

channels.label: National Commission for Women (NCW) 24x7 Helpline
channels.source_name: National Commission for Women (NCW)
channels.note: NCW's own site states: 'Call the 24x7 NCW helpline at 14490 for immediate assistance and support', and lists 'NCW Women Helpline (14490)' under its Complaint Redressal cells. IMPORTANT: the india.gov.in helpline directory still lists 7827170170 as the 'National Commission for Women Helpline' - that number appears nowhere on ncw.gov.in (not even in raw HTML), so it appears stale and was deliberately omitted in favour of the department's own current number.

channels.label: Child Helpline (national, toll-free)
channels.source_name: Ministry of Women and Child Development, Government of India
channels.note: Published as 'Child Helpline Toll free No. - 1098' directly by the owning ministry (WCD) as a tel: link on its homepage. Also listed as 'Child Help Line' on india.gov.in.

channels.label: Elderline - National Helpline for Senior Citizens (NHSC)
channels.source_name: Department of Social Justice & Empowerment, Government of India
channels.note: Published as 'Elder Helpline: 14567' on the Department of Social Justice & Empowerment's own Elderline site, which the ministry homepage links to as the 'National Helpline for Senior Citizens (NHSC)'. india.gov.in additionally lists a landline 011-20893999 alongside 14567 for the Senior Citizens Helpline.

channels.label: National Consumer Helpline (NCH)
channels.source_name: National Portal of India (india.gov.in), NIC / MeitY
channels.note: Listed as 'National Consumer Helpline (NCH)' on the National Portal of India helpline directory (page last reviewed/updated 14 July 2026). Note: the NCH portal consumerhelpline.gov.in could not be reached at time of research (DNS resolves to an NIC address but the host refused connections / returned 504), so only the number is cited here - not the NCH portal URL.

channels.label: Cyber Crime Helpline (online financial fraud reporting)
channels.source_name: National Cyber Crime Reporting Portal, MHA / I4C
channels.note: Confirmed on the National Cyber Crime Reporting Portal homepage banner (MHA / Indian Cyber Crime Coordination Centre - I4C), which reads: 'To report online financial fraud, call 1930' and 'register your complaint at cybercrime.gov.in'. Independently corroborated by the india.gov.in helpline directory, which lists 1930 as the Cyber Crime Helpline.

channels.label: National Cyber Crime Reporting Portal (file a cybercrime complaint)
channels.source_name: National Cyber Crime Reporting Portal, MHA / I4C
channels.note: Verified live. Ministry of Home Affairs portal for reporting cybercrime; supports anonymous reporting, women/children-related crime, financial fraud and other cybercrime, plus complaint tracking. Nationwide.

channels.label: CPGRAMS - Centralised Public Grievance Redress and Monitoring System
channels.source_name: Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances & Pensions, Government of India
channels.note: Verified live; this is the citizen-facing portal. The site states CPGRAMS is 'an online platform available to the citizens 24x7 to lodge their grievances to the public authorities on any subject related to service delivery... a single portal connected to all the Ministries/Departments of Government of India and States.' Supports tracking by registration ID and an appeal facility. Note: it does not cover RTI matters, subjudice/court matters, or religious matters.

channels.label: Central Vigilance Commission - lodge a corruption complaint
channels.source_name: Central Vigilance Commission (CVC), Government of India
channels.note: Verified live. CVC's Complaint Management System with a 'Citizen Login', complaint status tracking and a published complaint handling policy. Linked from cvc.gov.in as 'Lodge a complaint'. Covers corruption complaints against central government organisations.

channels.label: Relief Commissioner for Natural Calamities
channels.source_name: National Portal of India (india.gov.in), NIC / MeitY
channels.note: Listed on the National Portal of India helpline directory (page last reviewed/updated 14 July 2026).

channels.label: Road Accident Helpline
channels.source_name: National Portal of India (india.gov.in), NIC / MeitY
channels.note: Listed on the National Portal of India helpline directory (page last reviewed/updated 14 July 2026).
